home.title: Inspire FTC -

home.contributeSubtitle: There are many ways you can help grow the FTC community.
home.cardShareMaterialsDesc: Upload guides, CAD files, code examples and other resources for teams.
home.cardSubmitEventDesc: Announce a scrimmage, workshop, or community meetup.
home.cardReportDesc: Flag inappropriate content to help keep the platform safe.
home.cardJoinCommunityDesc: Sign up and connect with teams from around the world.

submitEvent.title: Submit Event Announcement
submitEvent.hint1: Instagram and verification URL are required — we verify announcements manually.
submitEvent.hint2: For a single-day offline event — use the date field.
submitEvent.hint3: For a meeting/stream/webinar with specific timing — use the start/end range.
submitEvent.hint4: After submission, status will be pending — you'll see it once approved.
